candidate_a.title: QuietQuest
candidate_a.target_user: Remote professionals who work in shared urban noise environments
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Lack of data on acoustic environments of candidate public coffee shops for focus time
candidate_a.core_concept: Acoustic sentiment monitoring based on non-private noise profile crowd-sourcing
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Visualization dashboard identifying specific coffee shops through public metadata metrics about business hours
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Web mapping layer highlighting locations coded by assumed levels of background conversational traffic intensity

candidate_b.title: QuietQuest
candidate_b.target_user: Remote professionals who work in shared urban noise environments
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Lack of data on acoustic environments of candidate public coffee shops for focus time
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A map where users manually rate the noise level of coffee shops.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A map interface with a simple 1-5 noise rating system. | Build a map interface; Implement a rating form for users; Display average ratings on the map

candidate_a.title: SyllabusSwap
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Finding open-source creative examples for repetitive academic assignment prompts
candidate_a.core_concept: Searchable registry of verified academic supplemental material
candidate_a.proposed_approach: Gamified metadata tagging for faculty members to recommend specific outside readings for specific syllabus modules
candidate_a.prototype_scope: Directory of three dummy course modules where items can be liked, sorted, and suggested via form submission

candidate_b.title: SyllabusSwap
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Finding open-source creative examples for repetitive academic assignment prompts
candidate_b.core_concept: Searchable registry of verified academic supplemental material.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A curated directory where users can submit and view links to supplemental materials for specific course modules.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A simple directory site with search and submission forms. | Create a database of 3 dummy course modules; Build a submission form for links; Implement a basic search/filter interface

candidate_a.title: Polyglot Plaza
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Low retention rates caused by repetitive and dry grammar exercises
candidate_a.core_concept: Massively parallel text adventure where inventory management items are earned exclusively through accurate contextual sentence translation.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A shared hub city map where dialogue between automated shopkeepers and NPCs prompts players to input simple phrases in their target language.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A simple market vendor area with one 'Bartering' minigame that unlocks trade items.

candidate_b.title: Polyglot Plaza
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Low retention rates caused by repetitive and dry grammar exercises
candidate_b.core_concept: Contextual language learning through inventory management and NPC interaction.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: A single-player text-based adventure where players must translate simple phrases to trade items with static NPCs.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: A market vendor scene with one bartering minigame requiring translation of three specific phrases. | Design three simple bartering scenarios; Implement basic text input and validation logic; Create static NPC dialogue trees

candidate_a.title: Multi-Channel Feedback Resolver
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Rapid identification of recurring regional training lapses reported in informal channels.
candidate_a.core_concept: Aggregating and categorizing feedback from disparate sources to identify training lapses.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A tool that categorizes feedback into predefined buckets to help managers spot trends.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A dashboard that ingests feedback from two sources and displays a categorized frequency chart. | Define feedback categories; Build ingestion for two sources; Implement categorization logic; Create dashboard

candidate_b.title: Multi-Channel Feedback Resolver
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Rapid identification of recurring regional training lapses reported in informal channels.
candidate_b.core_concept: Parsing and normalizing sentiment trends across messy Yelp reviews, physical location comment cards, and SMS responses.
candidate_b.proposed_approach: An aggregation engine detects semantic trends indicating training issues and issues digest reports specifically for site managers.
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Input normalization agent for two disparate survey feedback databases focused purely on categorization performance.

candidate_a.title: LegacyLeaf
candidate_a.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in contextualizing old digitized family photos with metadata
candidate_a.core_concept: Chronological storytelling grid for digital archives.
candidate_a.proposed_approach: A simple drag-and-drop interface for arranging photos on a timeline with user-defined text labels.
candidate_a.prototype_scope: A web interface allowing 10 image uploads and manual chronological ordering. | Build image upload functionality; Implement drag-and-drop sorting; Add text annotation fields for each image

candidate_b.title: LegacyLeaf
candidate_b.problem_or_desire: Difficulty in contextualizing old digitized family photos with metadata
candidate_b.core_concept: Chronological storytelling grid for digital archives
candidate_b.proposed_approach: Users pin photos to a virtual timeline populated with external major historical dates as anchor points
candidate_b.prototype_scope: Web interface where 10 image uploads can be arranged chronologically with editable text annotations per slot
